channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NYSC Member Arrested After Criticising Kwara Bridge Project on Social Media
item.description: Segun Ajibare, wey dey do NYSC service for Osun State, don get serious wahala as DSS and NSCDC operatives carry am go Ilorin, Kwara State. E concern the podcasts wey Ajibare dey run wey dey criticise ...

item.title: David Attenborough's longstanding critique of capitalism and the climate crisis
item.description: In this opinion piece, Jonathan Liew argues that David Attenborough, widely regarded as a beloved national treasure and a gentle figure akin to Paddington Bear, is in fact one of the most radical voic...

item.title: Federal Court Forfeits Assets of Convicted Former Accountant-General
item.description: Na Abuja, Federal High Court don give final go-ahead to take all properties wey belong to Chukwunyere Nnabuoku, former acting Accountant-General of the Federation, wey dem don convict, make e go to Fe...

item.title: How the AI Boom Is Straining Family Life
item.description: The AI boom is not only reshaping industries but also straining family dynamics, particularly in households where men are heavily involved in AI work. Many women—dubbed 'sad wives of AI'—report feelin...

item.title: Thinking Machines Develops AI That Can Process and Respond Simultaneously
item.description: Thinking Machines Lab, founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, has introduced a new type of AI called 'interaction models,' designed to mimic real human conversation. Unlike traditional AI models th...

item.title: The Christophers: Examining Art Forgery and Questions of Originality and Recognition
item.description: Steven Soderbergh’s latest film, The Christophers, delves into the morally complex world of art forgery through the story of Lori Butler, a former artist turned forger. Commissioned to complete the fi...

item.title: MDCAN and Resident Doctors Protest EFCC Operation at University of Uyo Teaching Hospital
item.description: The Medical and Dental Consultants Association of Nigeria (MDCAN) and the Association of Resident Doctors (ARD) at University of Uyo Teaching Hospital (UUTH) don vex as Economic and Financial Crimes C...

item.title: Princess of Wales visits Reggio Emilia to support early childhood education following recovery from cancer
item.description: The Princess of Wales, Catherine, received a warm welcome from hundreds of royal fans in Reggio Emilia, northern Italy, marking her first solo international visit in over three years following her can...

item.title: Boosting African Agriculture Requires Science, Investment, and Strong Policies
item.description: Agriculture is central to Africa’s livelihoods, supporting over 60% of households, and the continent holds nearly 60% of the world’s uncultivated arable land. However, farming faces multiple challenge...

item.title: Tanzania Monthly Economic Review March 2026 Shows Strong Export Growth Led by Gold and Manufacturing
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania has released the Monthly Economic Review for March 2026 covering data up to February 2026. The report indicates that Tanzania's economy stayed stable with headline inflation at 3....

item.title: When to Choose a Mattress Topper and When to Replace Your Mattress
item.description: Deciding whether to purchase a new mattress or simply add a mattress topper can significantly impact both comfort and sleep quality. Mattress toppers act as an additional layer of support and softness...

item.title: Pope Appoints Pastor Critical of Trump Policy to Lead Conservative Florida Diocese
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has appointed Father Emilio Biosca Agüero, a pastor in Washington D.C. known for criticizing the Trump administration's immigration enforcement policies, as the new Bishop of Naples, Flor...

item.title: NHRC Calls for Improved Collaboration Among Agencies to Implement Nigeria's National Human Rights Action Plan
item.description: The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) on Wednesday make call for better teamwork among government ministries, departments, agencies, civil society organisations and other stakeholders to ensure ...

item.title: Marco Rubio wears tracksuit reminiscent of Maduro during Air Force One trip
item.description: During a flight to China with President Donald Trump, Secretary of State Marco Rubio drew attention for wearing a grey Nike tracksuit on Air Force One. Initially boarding the plane in a suit, Rubio ch...

item.title: Exploring Time and Transformation Through David Ambarzumjan’s Brushstrokes
item.description: David Ambarzumjan’s 'Brushstrokes in Time' series explores the intersection of history, nature, and human influence through a unique approach to painting. Each piece begins with a recognizable scene—a...

item.title: TSN and Arusha Launch Platform to Boost Development and Investment Collaboration
item.description: TSN together with Arusha local authorities have launched a new platform aimed at bringing together stakeholders involved in development and investment initiatives across the region. The platform is de...

item.title: Nairobi Water Artisan Faces Charges Over Fake KCSE Certificate and Salary Fraud
item.description: The Director of Public Prosecutions (DPP) has arraigned Joshua Attuah Omia, an artisan at Nairobi City Water and Sewerage Company, over allegations of using a forged Kenya Certificate of Secondary Edu...

item.title: President Marcos clarifies no government action taken to arrest Senator Dela Rosa after Senate gunshots
item.description: On May 13, 2026, gunshots were reported in the Philippine Senate, causing a temporary lockdown of the premises. President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. issued a recorded statement clarifying that neither he no...

item.title: Starmer Reaffirms Confidence in Streeting Amid Labour Leadership Tensions
item.description: During the State Opening of Parliament, Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer faced mounting pressure over the stability of his Labour government. Health Secretary Wes Streeting reportedly confronted Starme...

item.title: The Dachau Bell: A Symbol of Hope and Freedom in 1945
item.description: During the final days of World War II, prisoners at Dachau concentration camp created a small bell from scrap metal and wire, which became a poignant symbol of hope and resistance amid the camp's extr...
